title: Mobile user uninstalls the mobile app
scenario: Poly Studio Mobile app uninstall changes user status from active to inactive on Lens tenant Device Users page
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the mobile device.
2. Ensure the device is connected and the user's status is shown as 'Active' on the Lens tenant (Manage → Device Users page).
3. Uninstall the Poly Studio Mobile app from the mobile device.
4. Navigate to the Lens tenant web portal → Manage → Device Users page.
5. Observe the status of the user who uninstalled the app.
expected: The user's status on the Lens tenant (Manage/Device Users page) should remain unchanged (e.g., remain 'Active') or reflect the actual device connection state, not change solely due to app uninstallation.
